ecs.taskdefinition.containerdefinitions..Description: The hard limit for the ulimit type.

ecs.taskdefinition.containerdefinitions..Allowed values: core | cpu | data | fsize | locks | memlock | msgqueue | nice | nofile | nproc | rss | rtprio | rttime | sigpending | stack

ecs.taskdefinition.containerdefinitions..Description: The soft limit for the ulimit type.
